title: vitis geniculata
intro: Vitis geniculata is a plant species within the Vitaceae family, also known as the grapevine family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Vitis geniculata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being.
